REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1510 33rd Ave. San Francisco)
Off Calendar Jul-14-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Patrick Nunns (Sucessor Trustee).

The sale was confirmed at $819,000.00. Bond was waived. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.
